items.content_html: Rosa-Nvim, a customized Neovim distribution that combines the flexibility of Neovim with the ready-made configurations and plugins from LunarVim. This distro focuses on practicality and performance for the user, making the code editing experience more enjoyable and unique.
items.title: pedrorosa-dev/rosa-nvim: Rosa-Nvim, a customized Neovim distribution that combines the flexibility of Neovim with the ready-made configurations and plugins from LunarVim. This distro focuses on practicality and performance for the user, making the code editing experience more enjoyable and unique.
